lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello! What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Port Official
lines.text: Hello, I'm keeping this berth free for the return of Lady Piscarilius.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lady Piscarilius is out at sea?

lines.speaker: Port Official
lines.text: Indeed, As a keen seafarer Lady Piscarilius often leads voyages herself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is she expected to return soon?

lines.speaker: Port Official
lines.text: Lady Piscarilius did not reveal how long she may be at sea for nor where she intended to explore.
